notes: fedcourts query with --topic '3840 Trademark' on ca11 returned nothing; unfiltered ca11 priors were case-level and off-point for a consolidation motion. Skipped CourtListener MCP entirely: any post-filing lookup on this docket or its companion risked retrieving the motion's actual ruling.
